# Pricing and Offer Elasticity Model

## Purpose

Model how price and offer changes affect conversion and revenue.

## Price elasticity

```text
elasticity = (% change in quantity demanded) / (% change in price)
```

## Expected revenue

```text
E[revenue] = price × conversion_rate(price) × traffic
```

## Offer variables

```text
free_trial_days
no_credit_card
demo_before_signup
refund
setup_help
pilot
discount
annual_prepay
```

## Use

Use when campaign traffic is decent but conversion or paid upgrade is weak.

## Warning

Discounts can improve conversion while damaging perceived value and LTV.
